profession.description: English noun-form role family, as narrow as the title + role section support. Example: 'backend engineer', 'registered nurse', 'store manager', 'barista'. Not the literal title; not the seniority-modified form.

title_normalized.description: The clean display title — modifiers kept (Senior/Lead/Principal/Java/Backend), team/store/region/work-mode/gender suffixes stripped. Source-language preserved when the role term is non-English (e.g. German 'Aushilfe / Abrufkraft als Postbote ...').

store_number.description: Store / branch / location identifier extracted from the title (e.g. '02209' from 'Store# 02209'). String to preserve leading zeros.

reference_number.description: Internal requisition / job ID extracted from the title (e.g. 'T0305', 'R0430475'). Distinct from store_number.
